description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rocker/verse:4.0.2 Docker image and a single deploy stage. Define a hidden .bookdown template that runs Rscript -e "bookdown::render_book('index.Rmd', 'all', output_dir = 'public')" and stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact. Add a mr-review job that extends .bookdown, runs the same rendering, then in after_script writes ENVIRONMENT_URL=https://$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE.$CI_PAGES_DOMAIN/-/$CI_PROJECT_NAME/-/jobs/$CI_JOB_ID/artifacts/public/index.html to deploy.env, publishes deploy.env as a dotenv artifact, sets the environment name to review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with the URL from $ENVIRONMENT_URL, and only runs for merge_requests. Add a pages job that also extends .bookdown and only runs on the master branch, publishing the public/ directory as GitLab Pages.
